rationale: Educ. Code §39.053 governs school accountability performance indicators—assessments, graduation rates, and college/career/military readiness. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the homestead exemption amount.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt a set of indicators of the quality of learning and achievement, including the indicators under Subsection (c).
_note: Rule text concerns K-12 accountability performance indicators only; no provision references homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values. No conflict identified.
